prompt: We're an e-commerce company doing about 100K purchases per month on Shopify. We have customer purchase history, browsing behavior analytics, Klaviyo email marketing, and a loyalty program. We want to move beyond basic 'recommended for you' product carousels. How can Personize help us create truly personalized shopping experiences?

assertions.name: uses_all_three_layers
assertions.description: Every proposal explicitly uses governance, unified memory, AND content generation

assertions.name: generates_content_not_tags
assertions.description: Proposals go beyond recommendation engines — AI WRITES content, not just selects products

assertions.name: passes_differentiation_test
assertions.description: Proposals could NOT be done with Klaviyo segments + a basic LLM call

assertions.name: cross_source_synthesis
assertions.description: Shows how combining Shopify purchases + browsing + Klaviyo + loyalty creates unique context

assertions.name: includes_governance_role
assertions.description: Governance controls brand voice, promotional rules, compliance (e.g. discount policies)
